title: The Gourmet World
description: A content modpack for cooking and  farming. Combines essential content mods with optimization for the best gourmet .experience
body:
The Gourmet World
A culinary-focused modpack centered around the Farmer's Delight ecosystem and other food and dimension mods. Experience a world brimming with new ingredients, complex recipes, and amazing structures to discover.

<details>
<summary>Mod List (The Gourmet World 1.0)
This modpack includes the following dependencies:</summary>

 * Trail&Tales Delight (Version 0.4.1)
 * Undergarden Delight (Version 1.2.1)
 * L_Ender 's Cataclysm Delight (Version 1.21.1-1.0.10)
 * Bountiful Fares (Version 3.0.3)
 * Sodium (Version mc1.21.1-0.6.13-neoforge)
 * NexusLib (Version 1.1.2)
 * Lithium (Version mc1.21.1-0.15.0-neoforge)
 * RunicLib (Version 4.3.9)
 * Cultural Delights (Version 0.17.7)
 * Corn Delight (Version 1.1.8-1.21.1)
 * FerriteCore (Version 7.0.2-neoforge)
 * Ube's Delight (Version neoforge-1.21.1-0.4.5)
 * Create (Version mc1.21.1-6.0.8)
 * Seed Delight (Version 1.0.1)
 * End's Delight (Version 2.5.1+neoforge.1.21.1)
 * Farmer's Delight (Version 1.21.1-1.2.9)
 * Dungeon's Delight (Version 1.3.8)
 * Expanded Delight (Version 0.1.3.2-neoforge)
 * Mysterious Mountain Lib (Version 1.2.14-1.21.1)
 * Create: Food (Version 2.0.0-beta-3)
 * Aquaculture Delight (Version 1.2.0)
 * Ocean's Delight (Version 1.0.3)
 * Crabber's Delight (Version 1.2.3)
 * Miner's Delight (Version 1.4.2)
 * Ender's Delight (Version 1.1.0)
 * Model Gap Fix (Version 1.21-1.10)
 * Pineapple Delight (Version 1.1.0-1.21.1-neoforge-fix)
 * MidnightLib (Version 1.7.5+1.21.1-neoforge)
 * Ars Nouveau (Version 5.10.6)
 * Brewin' And Chewin' (Version 4.4.1+1.21.1-neoforge)
 * Barbeque's Delight [Forge/NeoForge] (Version 1.2.2)
 * Geckolib (Version 4.8.2)
 * Lodestone (Version 1.7.1)
 * Rustic Delight (Version 1.5.0)
 * Curios API (Version 9.5.1+1.21.1)
 * Vegan Delight (Version 1.4.4)
 * My Nether's Delight (Version 1.9)
 * Ars Nouveau's Flavors & Delight (Version 2.1.9)
 * Crate Delight (Version 25.09.22-1.21-neoforge)
 * Cuisine Delight (Version 1.2.6)
 * Remove Reloading Screen (Version 5.0.10+mc1.21.1-forge)
 * ImmediatelyFast (Version 1.6.7+1.21.1-neoforge)
 * More Delight (for Farmer's Delight) (Version 25.07.28a-1.21-neoforge)
* Display Delight (Version 1.3.0)
* 
</details>
